items.author: NYT Business
items.text: U.S. Trade Deficit Grew in March
items.summary: Both exports and imports rose after the Supreme Court struck down many of the president’s highest levies in February.
items.text_it: Il deficit commerciale degli Stati Uniti è cresciuto a marzo
items.summary_it: Sia le esportazioni che le importazioni sono aumentate dopo che la Corte Suprema ha annullato molti dei prelievi più alti del presidente a febbraio.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Behind the Trump Administration’s Potential Rethink on A.I.
items.summary: Artificial intelligence has become a national security concern. That has federal officials rethinking how lightly it should regulate the technology.
items.text_it: Dietro il potenziale ripensamento dell'amministrazione Trump sull'INTELLIGENZA ARTIFICIALE
items.summary_it: L'intelligenza artificiale è diventata un problema di sicurezza nazionale. Ciò ha indotto i funzionari federali a ripensare alla leggerezza con cui dovrebbe regolamentare la tecnologia.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Here are 13 reasons why large caps will now beat small caps, according to UBS
items.summary: Positioning, earnings, momentum and historical evidence suggests large caps are set up to outperform small-cap stocks in the near term, says a team of strategists.
items.text_it: Ecco 13 motivi per cui le maiuscole ora batteranno le maiuscolette, secondo UBS
items.summary_it: Il posizionamento, gli utili, lo slancio e le prove storiche suggeriscono che le grandi capitalizzazioni sono impostate per sovraperformare le azioni a piccola capitalizzazione nel breve termine, afferma un team di strateghi.

items.text: America is using less oil, and the Iran conflict could further reduce its thirst for hydrocarbons
items.summary: The U.S.’s lessened dependency on crude also shows a decline in consumption of crude derivatives such as gasoline and diesel, even as prices at the pump are a major source of frustration for Americans right now.

items.text: America is using less oil, and the Iran conflict could further reduce its thirst for hydrocarbons
items.summary: The U.S.’s lessened dependency on crude also shows a decline in consumption of crude derivatives such as gasoline and diesel, even as prices at the pump are a major source of frustration for Americans right now.
items.text_it: L'America sta usando meno petrolio e il conflitto iraniano potrebbe ridurre ulteriormente la sua sete di idrocarburi
items.summary_it: La minore dipendenza degli Stati Uniti dal greggio mostra anche un calo del consumo di derivati del greggio come benzina e diesel, anche se i prezzi alla pompa sono una delle principali fonti di frustrazione per gli americani in questo momento.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: HSBC’s darkest scenario: stock markets down 35% and oil at $145
items.summary: HSBC Holdings on Tuesday said it’s made a big push into digital assets, including a tokenized gold product that’s already seen $1 billion in value traded, as the bank’s stock slumped on unexpectedly high provisions.
items.text_it: Lo scenario più cupo di HSBC: mercati azionari in calo del 35% e petrolio a $145
items.summary_it: HSBC Holdings martedì ha dichiarato di aver dato una grande spinta alle risorse digitali, incluso un prodotto d'oro tokenizzato che ha già visto $1 miliardo di valore scambiato, poiché le azioni della banca sono crollate a causa di accantonamenti inaspettatamente elevati.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: This is why stocks keep rallying, according to Morgan Stanley
items.summary: The steady increase in earnings growth expectations has led to a compression in the price-earnings multiple for the S&P 500 index. Furthermore, the growth is broader and more sustainable, Morgan Stanley argues
items.text_it: Questo è il motivo per cui le azioni continuano a salire, secondo Morgan Stanley
items.summary_it: Il costante aumento delle aspettative di crescita degli utili ha portato a una compressione del multiplo prezzo-utili per l'indice S&P 500. Inoltre, la crescita è più ampia e più sostenibile, sostiene Morgan Stanley

items.summary: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq drop as Hormuz tensions increase    Yahoo Finance Stock Market News: Dow Falls and Oil Rises on Hormuz Tensions    Barron's Dow tumbles 550 points as oil prices rise and investors fear Iran conflict could intensify again: Live updates    CNBC

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Today on the U.S. stock market, the Dow fell more than 550 points, S&P 500 declined, Nasdaq saw three-day winning streak snapped as Iran tensions lifted oil. Story stocks included GameStop, eBay, Berkshire Hathaway, Micron and Palantir. - MarketWatch

items.text: New York Times Wins 3 Pulitzer Prizes
items.summary: The Washington Post won the award for public service, considered the most prestigious of the Pulitzers, for its coverage of the Trump administration’s overhaul of federal agencies.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: ‘I always did the graveyard shift’: I worked for 54 years. Why on earth would I wait to claim Social Security at 70?
items.summary: The Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget published a paper suggesting capping Social Security at $100,000 for a married couple.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Amazon is taking on FedEx and UPS. That may not be so simple.
items.summary: FedEx and UPS shares are falling, but one analyst isn’t sure that Amazon’s new service will have a significantly disruptive effect.
